metadata.description: The consumption-side toolchain for Ultimate Tokens — skills that teach coding agents to use an exported design-token kit (colour · type · geometry) correctly in their own projects. Authored in the generator repo and parity-gated against its engines.

plugins.name: ultimate-tokens
plugins.description: Consume an exported Ultimate Tokens kit correctly in any project: color-tokens (53-role semantic colour), typography-tokens (seven-voice scale), geometry-tokens (two-tier dimensional system, Material-3-aligned radii). Each binds to the project's real exported variable names and is parity-gated against the engine.
